title: structure.route_capture input
description: Plan §4.2 — input to the four-variant routing ladder. capture_text is the user's words verbatim per §24.2 verbatim invariant; vault_tree carries folder centroid metadata for Variant A; recent_captures supplies temporal context for Variant B+C disambiguation.

capture_text.description: User's captured words, byte-exact verbatim. Routing operates on this text but never rewrites it (§24.2).

vault_tree.description: Snapshot of the vault's folder hierarchy with centroid metadata. Variant A walks this for cosine matching.

centroid_id.description: Identifier for the folder's medoid/centroid embedding

note_count.description: Folders with note_count < 3 are excluded from Variant A (centroid noisy per §4.3)

exemplar_titles.description: Top exemplar note titles from the folder; used by Variant B's few-shot prompt

recent_captures.description: Last N captures for temporal context. Variant C uses these to disambiguate concept references.

placed_at.description: Vault-relative path where the capture landed
